items.title: Hardwood Promises High-Speed JVM Apache Parquet Processing with Zero Mandatory Dependencies
items.summaryShort: Hardwood Promises High-Speed JVM Apache Parquet Processing with Zero Mandatory Dependencies. Hardwood, the project Gunnar Morling kick-started handling of Parquet files in Java, reached version 1.

items.title: Mini book: Agentic AI Architecture
items.summaryShort: Mini book: Agentic AI Architecture. In this eMag, we try to establish agentic AI architecture as a new type of software architecture that will likely dominate the industry for years to come.

items.title: Oracle Quietly Halves Free Tier Ampere A1 Compute Limits with No Public Announcement
items.summaryShort: Oracle Quietly Halves Free Tier Ampere A1 Compute Limits with No Public Announcement. Oracle halved the Always Free Ampere A1 compute allowance from 4 OCPUs and 24 GB RAM to 2 OCPUs and 12 GB RAM with no public announcement.

items.title: The browser wars aren't about search anymore — here are the best alternatives to Chrome and Safari
items.summaryShort: The browser wars aren't about search anymore — here are the best alternatives to Chrome and Safari. We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.

items.title: The Dune keypad device can be your meeting controller and more
items.summaryShort: The Dune keypad device can be your meeting controller and more. The gadget has three buttons, and it changes context based on what app you are looking at.
